[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 001100101 4
2 000000010 1
3 111011101 7
4 101111110 7
5 100000100 2
6 101011011 6
7 100001100 3
